name: KubeDockSecurityScan
description: Scan Kubernetes manifests, Dockerfiles, and Helm charts for security misconfigurations using Checkov. Publishes a detailed HTML report as a pipeline summary tab, with optional PR comments and OpenTelemetry metrics.
helpMarkDown: For full documentation and usage examples, see the [KubeDock Security Scan README](https://github.com/chloe-teo/kubedock-security-scan#readme).
author: chloe-teo

inputs.name: repoPath
inputs.label: Repository Path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to the checked-out repository to scan. Defaults to the pipeline workspace.

inputs.name: policyRepoPath
inputs.label: Policy Repo Path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to a pre-checked-out central policy repo containing checkov-policy.yaml and/or a custom-checks folder. Leave empty to run with default checks.

inputs.name: helmTemplatesPath
inputs.label: Helm Templates Path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to a pre-checked-out Helm templates to scan. Leave empty to scan the entire repository.

inputs.name: helmValuesPaths
inputs.label: Helm Values Paths
inputs.helpMarkDown: Comma-separated paths to checked-out Helm values files. Leave empty to scan the entire repository.

inputs.name: helmFolderPath
inputs.label: Helm Repository Path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to checked-out Helm repository directory. Leave empty to scan the entire repository.

inputs.name: failOnIssues
inputs.label: Fail on Issues
inputs.helpMarkDown: When enabled, the pipeline fails if Checkov finds any security issues. Disable to report issues as a warning without failing the pipeline.

inputs.name: postPrComment
inputs.label: Post PR Comment
inputs.helpMarkDown: Post an inline comment on the PR for each failed check. Requires allowing the build service to contribute to pull requests.
